race.comment: ONE HARD LADY (3) classy mare with excellent first-up figures and all four wins have come at this trip. Came to the end of her prep third-up when raced handy at Caulfield with 58.5 kg to finish seventh over 1000m in BM74 class. Should have little trouble on a heavy surface and will take stopping after the two good trials. VINOLASS (8) has a tidy win CV and can finish over the top of these with the big weight drop. Set to peak third-up and regular apprentice sticks. Go close. TOOMPINE (5) is experiencing a long win drought and gets a better set-up today. Outclassed last start when ninth over 1000m at Caulfield Heath in BM70 grade. Can race closer and improve quickly. BIG DAY OUT (4) is resuming from a spell. Fitter for recent hit-outs including a Wodonga jump-out win. Opened last campaign with a fourth at this track over 1000m. Include in multiples.
